news.summary: Kremlin officials said a large strike on Kyiv would be “inevitable” if Ukraine disrupted the May 9 event, a prospect President Volodymyr Zelensky has appeared to allude to.

news.headline: As Stockpiles Fall, U.S. Sells More Missiles Worth $17 Billion to Gulf Nations
news.summary: The United States and its partners have burned through an enormous amount of air defense missiles in the Iran war, and production is slow.
